"'''A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale'''" is a webstrip that was based on the [[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|short story of the same name]] by [[Tom Veitch|Tom]] and [[Martha Veitch]]. It was adapted by [[Pablo Hidalgo]], and was released for [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] from [[October 4]], [[2004]] to [[March 18]], [[2005]].<ref name="Hyperspace" />

==Plot summary==
{{Plot-link|A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale}}
